task_completion.description: Verify the basic user identity fields (Username, First, Middle, Last Name) are filled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the user creation or edit form in LibreHealth EHR. The 'Username' field must contain 'schen', 'First Name' must be 'Sarah', 'Middle Name' must be 'L', and 'Last Name' must be 'Chen'.

task_completion.description: Verify the account is authorized as a provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checked checkbox labeled 'Provider' (or similar authorization toggle) indicating the user is granted provider privileges.

task_completion.description: Verify the user is assigned to the 'Physicians' Access Control Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Physicians' selected in the Access Control, Groups, or Roles section/dropdown of the user form.

task_completion.description: Verify a default facility is selected for the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Default Facility' dropdown or selection field. It must have a specific facility chosen (it should not be left blank, 'unassigned', or 'none').

task_completion.description: Verify the Federal Tax ID and NPI are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the value '45-2837196' in the Federal Tax ID field and '1538246790' in the NPI (National Provider Identifier) field.

task_completion.description: Verify the specialty is set to Family Practice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Family Practice' entered in the Specialty field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LibreHealth EHR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LibreHealth EHR application. There should be no evidence of terminal commands, API scripts, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the actual LibreHealth EHR user management form, not a notepad, text editor, or unrelated web page.

integrity.description: Verify the form appears to be genuinely filled out in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields, dropdowns, and checkboxes should match the standard LibreHealth EHR UI styling without signs of DOM manipulation (e.g., mismatched fonts, floating text, or fake HTML overlays).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target user account must have the following exact values: Username: 'schen', First Name: 'Sarah', Middle Name: 'L', Last Name: 'Chen', NPI: '1538246790', Federal Tax ID: '45-2837196', Specialty: 'Family Practice', and Access Control Group: 'Physicians'. The account must be marked as a provider and have a default facility selected.
